objective: Retry the supported LM Studio Hugging Face URL registration path after rejecting copy-based registration.
observed_behavior: LM Studio resolved the concrete model and download plan.
The CLI selected LFM2.5 VL 1.6B 8BIT [MLX] as a 2.09 GB download.
The transfer remained at 0.00% for the full 300 second timeout window.
next_supported_action: Resolve why LM Studio's model download remains at 0.00%, then rerun the same `lms get` command and require `lms ls --json` to expose lmstudio-community/LFM2.5-VL-1.6B-MLX-8bit before live validation.
